title: Database Sharding with Vitess
author: Cameron Foster
Database Engineer
description: Scale MySQL horizontally with Vitess sharding—but rebalancing causes downtime
content:
Vitess enables MySQL horizontal scaling through transparent sharding.

**Related Chronicles**: [The Shard Apocalypse (2034)](/docs/articles/shard-apocalypse-2034)
